journey.name: 08-settings
journey.description: 设置：主题切换/安全设置入口/关于/协议。WebDAV 备份恢复超范围，不进入填写。

actions.action: Open the navigation drawer and navigate to the settings (设置) screen
Verify the settings screen renders without crashing
Toggle a theme/appearance setting and verify the UI responds without crashing
Open the about (关于) screen and verify it renders without crashing
Open the user-protocol/markdown (协议) screen and verify it renders without crashing
Do NOT enter any real WebDAV domain/account/password anywhere
Navigate back to the home screen
